seoDescription: Site-first assessment for power quality, demand planning, and implementation risk reduction.

hero.heading: On-Site Power Analysis
hero.body: GenFix on-site analysis identifies real load behaviour, installation constraints, and operating risks before equipment selection or deployment.

sections.title: What We Assess On Site
sections.body: Our engineers assess technical and operational conditions so recommendations are grounded in how your site actually runs.

cards.title: Load Profile And Peak Demand
cards.description: We map running loads, startup spikes, and critical circuits to reduce undersizing or oversizing risk.

cards.title: Access, Environment, And Layout
cards.description: Site access, ventilation, weather exposure, and noise considerations are built into deployment planning.

cards.title: Compliance And Safety Checks
cards.description: Earthing, isolation, and handover requirements are reviewed to support safe operation from day one.

sections.title: Analysis Outcomes
sections.body: Every assessment ends with practical recommendations that support procurement, mobilisation, and long-term reliability.

cards.title: Recommended Equipment Path
cards.description: Clear guidance on rental versus purchase options based on runtime and project duration.

cards.title: Deployment Plan
cards.description: Staged mobilisation notes cover installation sequence, checks, and commissioning milestones.

cards.title: Cost And Risk Visibility
cards.description: Risk controls and lifecycle implications are documented so teams can approve with confidence.
